programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A 93-year-old files a complaint while holding a gun; a sexy outfit gets a defendant in hot water.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A notorious killer carves up his own face in hopes of sending a message.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The husband and father of a murdered family attacks their killer in court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The judge gives a 79-year-old woman a final warning: stop feeding feral cats or go to jail.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An overdose in a court bathroom; an arsonist loses his cool; a judge's creative punishment.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An armed robbery suspect escapes; the mother of a shooting victim unleashes her fury.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A retired NFL star comes face to face with the man who invaded his home; a wild Kentucky courtroom.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge gets suspended after making a teenager wear handcuffs after falling asleep in court.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A daughter testifies against her father; a suburban hate crime caught on camera and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts a daring courthouse escape; and a judge catches a peeping Tom.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: An unidentified young woman is found shot to death.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Teenage boys are shot outside a nightclub in Dallas; missing woman.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Witnesses to a murder fear retaliation if they speak.; a man is killed in front of his son.
